problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: If Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
